THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN, SCOTT MAGTOGO, LLC $4,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
